content:
Given the undirected dynamic graph with the edges:
[(7, 8, 1), (0, 8, 2), (3, 8, 3), (5, 9, 3), (4, 5, 6), (0, 4, 7), (3, 7, 9), (5, 7, 10), (8, 9, 12), (5, 8, 13), (7, 9, 13), (4, 9, 14), (2, 5, 18), (4, 6, 19)],

We need to find the nodes linked with node 5 exactly at time 18.

First, we will scan each edge (u, v, t) and collect the other node whenever the time t matches the queried time AND one of the nodes matches the queried node.

* Edge (7, 8, 1) has node 7 and time 1. -> Add node 8.
* Edge (0, 8, 2) has node 0 and time 2. -> Ignore.
* Edge (3, 8, 3) has node 3 and time 3. -> Ignore.
* Edge (5, 9, 3) has node 5 and time 3. -> Add node 9.
* Edge (4, 5, 6) has node 4 and time 6. -> Add node 5.
* Edge (0, 4, 7) has node 0 and time 7. -> Add node 4.
* Edge (3, 7, 9) has node 3 and time 9. -> Add node 7.
* Edge (5, 7, 10) has node 5 and time 10. -> Add node 7.
* Edge (8, 9, 12) has node 8 and time 12. -> Add node 9.
* Edge (5, 8, 13) has node 5 and time 13. -> Add node 8.
* Edge (7, 9, 13) has node 7 and time 13. -> Add node 9.
* Edge (4, 9, 14) has node 4 and time 14. -> Add node 9.
* Edge (2, 5, 18) has node 2 and time 18. -> Add node 5.
* Edge (4, 6, 19) has node 4 and time 19. -> Ignore.

Now we have collected all nodes that are linked with node 5 at time 18. The answer is: [5, 8, 9, 7].

Answer: [5, 8, 9, 7]
